items.tldr: fix(embeddings): restore _cosine_similarity dropped in package split (#4099)
fix(idr): replay trust gates require positively VERIFIED, not merely not-BROKEN (#4098)
fix(genome): stop time-decay compounding super-exponentially across daily sessions (#4097)
fix(hooks): route silent fail-open deny gates through canonical hook_response shim (#4096)
fix(agora): surface DEFER follow-up auto-file failure on the PR comment (#4095)
feat(moat): Decision Evidence Receipt — real end-to-end demo + zero-trust verifier (#546)
chore(guild): remove dedicated Guild skills, commands, and lib (#4092)
